id.description: Stamped via computed_fields from the real API's BucketUtilizationNum field (the wire's own unique record identifier). hooks/wasabi-stats-api/hooks.go's RecordHook fallback (first non-empty of bucket, then date, then the literal stream name) only fires on the rare record the real API ever emits with no id at all -- ported verbatim from legacy for defense-in-depth, not expected to trigger against the documented Wasabi Stats API response shape.

bucket_utilization_num.description: Real API field BucketUtilizationNum: the unique numeric id of this bucket-utilization record.

acct_num.description: Real API field AcctNum: the Wasabi account number this record belongs to.

bucket_num.description: Real API field BucketNum: Wasabi's internal numeric bucket id.

bucket.description: Real API field Bucket: the bucket name.

region.description: Real API field Region: the Wasabi storage region this bucket utilization was recorded in.

date.description: Computed from the real API's StartTime field (the start of this utilization record's reporting window).

storage_bytes.description: Alias of the real API's PaddedStorageSizeBytes (billable storage after Wasabi's minimum-object-size rule is applied), kept under this bundle's pre-existing field name for parity with legacy's own schema.
